compiled_state.title: Feasibility reviewer agent hallucinates non-existent GitHub issues — claims verified CLI commands don't exist
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Bug Description
The `dso:feasibility-reviewer` agent (currently running on sonnet) hallucinated GitHub issue numbers and incorrectly claimed that `claude plugin list` does not exist as a CLI command. During the brainstorm for the environment-portability epic, the feasibility reviewer:

1. Claimed issues #13778, #11740, and #12999 documented `claude plugin list` being closed as NOT PLANNED
2. Stated there is no `claude plugin list` subcommand in the official CLI
3. Scored integration_risk as 1 (critical) based on this false premise

## Actual Behavior
`claude plugin list` works and has existed for months. Both human-readable and `--json` output formats are functional. The command correctly lists installed plugins including `dso@digital-service-orchestra`.

## Impact
The hallucinated findings caused a full review cycle to be invalidated, wasting context and time. If the feasibility reviewer's output had been trusted without verification, the epic approach would have been incorrectly pivoted away from a working mechanism.

## Suggested Fix
Upgrade the `dso:feasibility-reviewer` agent from sonnet to opus to reduce hallucination risk. The feasibility reviewer evaluates external integration points where hallucinated capabilities or non-existent bugs can derail entire epic designs — accuracy is critical for this role.

## Reproduction Steps
1. Run `/dso:brainstorm` on a feature involving Claude Code plugin CLI commands
2. Observe feasibility reviewer output referencing specific GitHub issue numbers
3. Verify the referenced issues — they don't exist or say something different

## Evidence
Verified locally:
```
$ claude plugin list 2>&1 | grep -A3 "dso@"
  ❯ dso@digital-service-orchestra
    Version: 0.2.2
    Scope: project
    Status: ✔ enabled
```

comments.body: INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED: safeguard_approval | LLM-behavioral: feasibility reviewer hallucinates. Fix requires editing agents/feasibility-reviewer.md (safeguard). Re-run in interactive session to approve.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
